word: G1170 - δεῖνα - deîna - di'-nah - Such a man

sections.paragraph:
- Original: δεῖνα

- Transliteration: Deina

- Phonetic: di'-nah

- Definition:

1. such a one, a certain one, i.e. one whose name I cannot call on the instant, or whose name it is of no importance to mention

- Origin: probably from the same as G1171 (through the idea of forgetting the name as fearful, i.e. strange)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun

- Strong's: Probably from the same as G1171 (through the idea of forgetting the name as fearful that is strange); so and so (when the person is not specified): - such a man.
